---
title: "Chocolate Sales"
date: 2026-03-27
categories: [Machine Learning, Forecasting, EDA]
image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/2449665/pexels-photo-2449665.jpeg"
description: "Visual Analysis and forecasting project using historical data and Random Forest Regressor."
---


![](https://images.pexels.com/photos/65882/chocolate-dark-coffee-confiserie-65882.jpeg){width=85%}

*[Pixabay](https://www.pexels.com/@pixabay) - pexels*


## Overview
Exploratory analysis of chocolate sales in 6 countries
 and prediction of chocolate sales for the next year with Random Forest Regressor model.

## Data
Data came from [this dataset](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/saidaminsaidaxmadov/chocolate-sales).
The dataset represents a global chocolate company tracking sales performance across products, regions, and employees.

## Tools
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?logo=python&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/NumPy-013243?logo=numpy&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/pandas-150458?logo=pandas),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Matplotlib-11557C),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/scikit--learn-F7931E?logo=scikit-learn),
`Random Forrest Regressor`

## Analysis
[Dashboard](chocolate_sales/chocolate_sales_dashboard.qmd)\
[Open the notebook](../notebooks/chocolate_sales_notebook.html)\
[Github Repository](https://github.com/lmacakova/chocolate_sales)
